---
anchor-sections: false
---

::: page-content
# [Contact]{style="color:#2F0407; display:block; text-align:center;"}

<p style="text-align:center;">

**I am always open to connect and collaborate!**

</p>

📧 **Email**: pstroud\@msm.edu \| paris.stroud\@gmail.com\
🔗 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/parissstroud" target="blank">LinkedIn</a>

Download my <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1kNkvIKgccdEncf1EJXzHsX6G60eUL5ZG/view?usp=sharing" target="blank">Resume</a>

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/paris-stroud-wawa.jpg"
     alt="Paris Stroud at West Atlanta Watershed Alliance volunteer event"
     width="250" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #2F0407; border-radius:15px;" />
```
:::
